ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the application */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for downloading the application */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the application's image */,
  "button_label" TEXT /* Label for the download button */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the application */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the application */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the application in bytes */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Supported operating system */,
  "system_requirements" TEXT /* System requirements for running the application */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL for the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the application */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was downloaded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the download was initiated */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the download */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value given by the user (e.g., from 1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User's comment about the application */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., bug report, feature request) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., super admin, moderator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_categories" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "primary_category" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the category is primary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., download, rate) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application involved in the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_activity_logs" (
  "admin_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin activity log */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., add application, update application) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application involved in the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_activity_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES administrators ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
